narration: Extra CO2 doesn’t just warm the air—it changes our oceans.
visual_description: Hook visual: Extra CO2 doesn’t just warm the air—it changes our oceans.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Extra CO2 doesn’t just warm the air—it changes our oceans.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Extra CO2 doesn’t just warm the air—it changes our oceans.

narration: As CO2 dissolves in seawater, it forms carbonic acid, altering pH levels.
visual_description: Context visual: As CO2 dissolves in seawater, it forms carbonic acid, altering pH levels.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: As CO2 dissolves in seawater, it forms carbonic acid, altering pH levels.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: As CO2 dissolves in seawater, it forms carbonic acid, altering pH levels.

narration: This impacts carbonate ions, essential for shell-building creatures like corals and mollusks.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This impacts carbonate ions, essential for shell-building creatures like corals and mollusks.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This impacts carbonate ions, essential for shell-building creatures like corals and mollusks.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This impacts carbonate ions, essential for shell-building creatures like corals and mollusks.

narration: But it’s not all grim—marine life is remarkably resilient.
